channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This was the most disturbing part of Elon Musk’s Trump rally speech
item.description: Elon Musk achieved platinum meme status and got ridiculed on Saturday Night Live for gleefully leaping onstage at a Trump rally over the weekend. But a photo of Trump glowering as the Tesla tycoon flung himself skyward was far from Musk’s most egregious moment at that rally.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Water Utility Giant Hit by Hackers: Cybersecurity Concerns Rise
item.description: American Water Works, the largest U.S. water supplier, breached by hackers; cybersecurity concerns and data breaches on the rise
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Oracle touts ‘tip and tail’ release model for Java library development
item.description: Oracle is touting a “tip and tail” model for Java library development that the company says would give application developers a better experience and at the same time help library developers innovate faster.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Black Friday 2024 sales are coming – here's what Aussies want to buy this November
item.description: Over a thousand everyday Australians were asked if they're looking forward to the upcoming Black Friday sales – here's what they said.
item.dc:creator: sharmishta.sarkar@futurenet.com (Sharmishta Sarkar), TechRadar

item.title: DoD wringing out zero trust concepts under assessment process
item.description: The Pentagon is also working with major cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google to evaluate their zero trust implementations. The post DoD wringing out zero trust concepts under assessment process first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: American Water, largest water utility in US, dealing with cyberattack
item.description: The largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States announced Monday that it was the victim of a cyberattack, prompting the firm to pause billing to customers.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Musk to make more Pennsylvania appearances ahead of election
item.description: Billionaire tech mogul Elon Musk plans to make more appearances in Pennsylvania to boost former President Trump’s campaign in the final four weeks before the election.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Control the path and power of hurricanes like Milton? Forget it, scientists say
item.description: In the wake of hurricanes that have disrupted lives for millions in the U.S., some people may wonder if extreme weather events could be somehow controlled.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling And Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A holistic approach to transitioning to a fully mature zero trust architecture
item.description: Implementing zero trust requires a significant cultural shift within all levels of an agency, as zero trust does not start and stop with IT professionals. The post A holistic approach to transitioning to a fully mature zero trust architecture first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Rust resumes rise in popularity
item.description: Rust, the fast and memory-safe programming language born out of Mozilla, has resumed its rise up the monthly Tiobe index of programming language popularity, although it still has not cracked the index’s top 10.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FTC antitrust case against Amazon moves forward, several state claims dismissed
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission’s (FTC) antitrust case against Amazon will move forward, but several state claims against the e-commerce giant were dismissed, according to a newly unsealed ruling. In a ruling filed last week under seal, U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Why evolving cyber threats mean small businesses are ransomware targets
item.description: Dark Matter’s powerful fictional short film based on real events, Butterfly, goes inside the experience of a small business as its world is turned upside down by ransomware.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 80% of developers need to upgrade their skills by 2027
item.description: Generative AI will place new demands on developers in the coming years, according to a recent report by research firm Gartner, which found in a survey of 300 organizations in the US and UK late last year that 56% viewed developers with skills in AI and machine learning as the most in-demand role in
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Previews: What’s in the latest build?
item.description: The Windows 11 2023 Update has been released, but behind the scenes, Microsoft is constantly working to improve the newest version of Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Advocacy groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending Swiss criminal probe of woman's death
item.description: Advocacy groups behind a so-called suicide capsule said Sunday they have suspended the process of taking applications to use it — which numbered over 370 last month — as a criminal investigation into its first use in Switzerland is completed.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Why cloud security outranks cost and scalability
item.description: According to a study by Akamai Technologies, 87% of digital-native businesses (which seems to be a term specific to Asia/Pacific) now prioritize security over cost and scalability when selecting a cloud provider.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IBM expands Nvidia GPU options for cloud customers
item.description: IBM is offering expanded access to Nvidia GPUs on IBM Cloud to help enterprise customers advance their AI implementations, including large language model (LLM) training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, NewsNation
